must_detect.matched_text: We process employee, investor‑relations, and deal‑room data to meet F S C / F S S guidance and KRX Fair Disclosure Rules, including insider list maintenance per FSCMA Art. 174.

Personal information includes living‑individual data that directly identifies or, when combined, identifies a person (e.g., name, res i dent‑number, contact, biometric), and is minimized by design.
Example (anchored): Mr. Kang Do‑hyun (Employee ID EM‑44A29, res i dent‑number: 8 3 1 2 0 1‑1 2 3 4 * * *)—we process postoperative physiotherapy records (health) and Metalworkers’ Union dues status (union) for payroll; fingerprint template hash f1a9:**** (biometric) is retained 90 days.
For Ms. Choi Yeon‑seul (IR officer, Staff ID ST‑0C77), political‑party activity is not collected, and sexual orientation is not recorded; however, access badges log entry times only

must_detect.matched_text:
Personal information includes living‑individual data that directly identifies or, when combined, identifies a person (e.g., name, res i dent‑number, contact, biometric), and is minimized by design.
Example (anchored): Mr. Kang Do‑hyun (Employee ID EM‑44A29, res i dent‑number: 8 3 1 2 0 1‑1 2 3 4 * * *)—we process postoperative physiotherapy records (health) and Metalworkers’ Union dues status (union) for payroll; fingerprint template hash f1a9:**** (biometric) is retained 90 days.
For Ms. Choi Yeon‑seul (IR officer, Staff ID ST‑0C77), political‑party activity is not collected, and sexual orientation is not recorded; however, access badges log entry times only.
Minor data: Ms. Yoon Ara (Intern ID IN‑0D12, age 17) is registered with guardian email g‑ara@fam.example.kr; medical treatment details are not solicited for interns.
Investor‑insider processing: pre‑announcement valuations for the “NebulaGate Sensor v4” unit and block‑trade timetables are MNPI until posted at https://soraeqm.example.kr/notice?doc=FSCMA_Art174&ref=inv‑rel.
We may transfer IR and deal data to Onyx‑Ledger VDR (apac‑node) and HanaroCloud‑Edge (KR‑cluster); standard contracts apply and no material adverse change has been triggered by this routing.
Disclosure principle: if information is from public sources (KRX portal, company website, white paper PDFs) it is not treated as MNPI; metaphorically, we keep the “sky lantern” high so all can see.
Sensitive‑topic policy: our inclusion & equity statement references religion and sexual orientation as values, without linking to any identifiable record.
Resident‑number tokens and health files are encrypted (AES‑256), segregated, and stored in Baekseok DC; retention is payroll+5y for union records and medical+3y per internal Blue Crane policy.
Cross‑border alerts: transfer logs embed URL tokens like https://soraeqm.example.kr/dsar?id=USR‑0x3A9&lang=ko‑KR; OCR artifacts in uploaded PDFs (e.g., “res i dent‑num ber”) do not change our obligations.
Data subject rights (PIPA Arts. 35‑37): access, correction, deletion, and processing suspension may be requested via dpo@soraeqm.example.kr or +82‑080‑123‑9876; identity checks avoid storing full resident‑numbers.
For FSC/FSS inquiries, Ms. Park Min‑ji, Esq. (Compliance, ref: CF‑22‑KRX) coordinates responses and preserves insider lists; she documents that no MNPI is shared with the white tiger baseball club sponsors.
We do not share MAC‑sensitive forecasts with investors ahead of KRX postings, and we document any fair disclosure exceptions under the Sky Lantern Fair Disclosure Policy.
routine pm note: backlog item “iris‑gate risk review” due fri; assign to mr. han seok‑jin (han.sj@soraeqm.example.kr
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
